title: Product Engineer
description:
At FLEXXON, we foster a culture of innovation, creativity, and inclusivity. You'll have the opportunity to work alongside talented individuals who are passionate about making a difference. We offer a dynamic and supportive work environment that encourages professional growth and recognizes your achievements.

If you are excited about the prospect of taking on new challenges, making an impact, and contributing to the success of our products, we would love to hear from you.

Responsibilities:

  • Present product and solution in response to customer enquiries and problems.
  • Conduct market research, analysis, and competition to formulate product strategy.
  • Design and manage product communications, including external and internal feature announcements, use cases, reference materials, and press releases.
  • Manage storage products, overseeing the entire process from demand, specification, design, development, and testing to mass production.
  • Analyze, troubleshoot, and resolve issues.
  • Collaborate with R&D and other cross-functional counterparts to drive the development of advanced features and technology.
  • Apply strong business sense to identify and capitalize on opportunities that drive product success and revenue growth.
  • Develop and implement strategies that support revenue generation in collaboration with the sales team.
  • Implement knowledge management practices to ensure the effective use and sharing of information.
  • Integrate automation and AI technologies to enhance operational efficiency.

Requirements:

  • Degree/Diploma in Electronics Engineering, Computer Engineering, Microelectronics, or a related major.
  • Excellent presentation and communication skills, with proficiency in both written and spoken English and Chinese, as this role involves liaising with our associates in China.
  • 3-5 years of product or project management experience.
  • Familiarity with Windows and Linux operating systems is preferred.
  • Strong business sense and ability to understand and drive business outcomes.
  • Experience with knowledge management systems and practices.
  • Understanding of automation and AI technologies and their application in improving workflow efficiency.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team, with strong analytical and multitasking skills.

postedCompany.description:
Flexxon provides specialized design-in services worldwide supply chain solutions for Flash-based storage solutions - NAND Solution Products; serving specifically the INDUSTRIAL, MEDICAL & AUTOMOTIVE (IMA) sectors.

Collaboration with World NAND Solution Technology leader and provider, Flexxon offer leading edge Flash-based storage products with exceptional performance and outstanding reliability.

Flexxon Flash-based storage product range:

  • SSD
  • NAND Flash Modules
  • Storage Cards
  • Drive with variety of interfaces support.
  • Special capacity and customized features according to customer requirement
postedCompany.name: FLEXXON PTE. LTD.
